floor_history.headline: recon: the 2026-07-06 owner ruling (do-while-zero-exception, commit 5c3a192f) sanctions this exact single-level wrap with ONLY an inline FAKE annotation — exhaustion is no longer a hard gate; primary

frontier.hypothesis: PRIMARY (Option A under the 2026-07-06 ruling): keep the wrap, add `/* FAKE: keeps reorg.c relax_delay_slots from inverting the two default-path j/nop pairs in the stage-id switch */` at src/text1a_c.c:1139, and route through a fresh layer-2 cheat-reviewer — the construct is now rule-compliant as-is
frontier.mechanism: do-while-zero-exception (owner ruling 2026-07-06): single-level wraps sanctioned for any codegen effect with effect-level FAKE annotation; NOTE_INSN_LOOP_BEG sets LABEL_OUTSIDE_LOOP_P which suppresses the invert-jump peephole
frontier.next_probe: Run the two cheap structural probes below first (to honor the judge constraint's alternatives-first spirit and enrich the annotation), then annotate and re-invoke cheat-reviewer with the ruling citation + this ledger; surface the constraint-vs-ruling supersession to the judge explicitly

frontier.hypothesis: Structural probe: reordering the pre-call global stores (D_800A9CF8/D_800A9D00/D_800A9D04/D_800A9CFA) or moving the return-block geometry does NOT remove the peephole's target (expected KILLED — the j/nop pairs live in switch expansion, not the stores), confirming no natural-geometry close-out exists
frontier.mechanism: relax_delay_slots fires on the jump-over-jump shape that expand_case's default edges create; statement order outside the switch cannot change that shape
frontier.next_probe: Two sandbox measurements without the wrap: (a) stores reordered to match emit order, (b) `return a2 + D_800A9CFE * 104;` direct form — record scores (expect 4 each) in hypotheses.md as the documented negatives

frontier.hypothesis: Structural probe: giving the switch an explicit empty `default:` or reordering case bodies (case 4 / case 0x12 / case 7 order) leaves the decision tree and the invert-jump exposure unchanged (expected KILLED), closing WIP Option B
frontier.mechanism: expand_case sorts case values and builds the balanced tree regardless of source case order; no C-level switch respelling controls reorg.c's peephole
frontier.next_probe: One sweep_variants run over 3-4 switch respellings without the wrap; if all score 4, the exhaustion record is complete and Option A stands as the finished form

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Unannotated empty `do { } while (0);` at src/text1a_c.c:1139 fails do-while-zero-exception's mandatory prerequisites (no `// FAKE` annotation, no lever-exhaustion ledger) — the exact failing shape already documented in memory/wip/func_80044670/meta.json (head_carries_cheat=true, auditor finding 2026-06-17). Construct IS load-bearing (strip: score 0→4, confirmed 2026-06-24), so a simple revert breaks the oracle. Worker must either (A) try structural alternatives first (if/else chain, store reordering, compute-then-store rewrite) and if each fails, annotate with `/* FAKE: defeats reorg.c relax_delay_slots invert-jump peephole via NOTE_INSN_LOOP_BEG / LABEL_OUTSIDE_LOOP_P suppression */` + record lever-exhaustion in WIP, then re-invoke cheat-reviewer; or (B) find a non-do-while structural alternative per WIP next_hypotheses Options B/C.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
